validation.command: node src/cli.js project add examples/demo-api --alias demo --json
validation.summary: Demo project registered successfully with isolated LAUNCHDECK_HOME.
Isolated add/start/duplicate/inspect/logs/events/stop/clean smoke passed; duplicate start returned existing run instead of spawning a second server.

controllerChecks: Demo uses checked-in examples/demo-api/scripts/server.js for long-running behavior and no inline node -e command.
Demo has no external service dependencies.
Server exposes /health, /events, and /_demo/exit for readiness, observability, and stale recovery demonstrations.
README documents project add, start, duplicate existing-run behavior, inspect, restart/stop, stale recovery, logs/events, and safe clean.
Leader smoke confirmed add/start/duplicate/inspect/logs/events/stop/clean through real CLI entrypoints.
Leader cleanup removed isolated LAUNCHDECK_HOME and demo scratch output; no demo server process or port 8888 listener remained.
acceptedResidualRisks: Demo smoke was Windows-local and does not satisfy macOS/Linux cross-platform release evidence.
T034 must align the root README with this demo and current CLI surface.
followUpWork: T034 update README command reference and safety documentation.
